headline: 3 Restaurant Stocks Likely to Surpass Q2 Earnings Expectations
summary: Value offerings, digital promotions and cost controls are expected to help CAKE, BJRI and CMG outperform Q2 estimates.

headline: Yum Brands (YUM) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
summary: Yum (YUM) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
